VICTORY_CONDITIONS.REACH_TOP_CLERGY: Reach the top of the Clergy Progress Path
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.REACH_TOP_KINGDOM: Reach the top of the Kingdom Progress Path
VICTORY_CONDITIONS.REACH_TOP_LABOUR: Reach the top of the Labour Progress Path

VICTORY_CONDITIONS_CELEBRATIONS.VC_COMPLETED_DESC: We should be proud of the completion of the following deeds:
VICTORY_CONDITIONS_CELEBRATIONS.VC_FAILED_DESC: Unfortunately, we have not been able to reach the following aspiration:
VICTORY_CONDITIONS_CELEBRATIONS.VC_KINGDOM_FORTRESS_SUCCESS: Thanks to your war efforts and strategic insight, you made your castle into an impregnable fortress for the realm, bringing honour and glory to your king. You are indeed a hero of the realm!
VICTORY_CONDITIONS_CELEBRATIONS.VC_CLERGY_PROSPEROUS_PRIORY_SUCCESS: As the Clergy inaugurates your Abbatial Church, you muse upon what you have achieved. You raised an Abbey of the Faith and assembled a respectful monastic community. There is little doubt that you made this land a better place.
VICTORY_CONDITIONS_CELEBRATIONS.VC_LABOR_COMMUNE_SUCCESS: As you pass the City Belfry, you can't help but feel proud. Over time, you have transformed this small serfdom into a thriving village of free folk!

CONDITIONS.WARN_FAIL_VC_PROSPEROUS_PRIORY_DESC:
You have reached the maximum villager population for your current Aspiration. Accepting a new villager will fail the Aspiration.

Do you want to proceed?
